cards.back: A multi-user, multi-tasking operating system created by Bell Labs in 1969
UNIX is an acronym for 'UNIX Time-Sharing System'

cards.front: What is the primary goal of UNIX standardization?
cards.back: To establish a common set of interfaces and APIs for different UNIX implementations

cards.front: What is the primary benefit of UNIX standardization?
cards.back: To ensure compatibility and interoperability between different UNIX systems
A command-line interface that allows users to interact with the operating system and execute commands
